abstract:
AI Consciousness and Public Perceptions:
Four Futures1
Ines Fernandez2, Nicoleta Kyosovska2, Jay Luong2,3, Gabriel Mukobi4
Abstract
The discourse on risks from advancedAIsystems(“AIs”)typicallyfocusesonmisuse,
accidents and loss of control, but the question of AIs’ moral status could have
negative impacts which are of comparable significance and could be realised within
similar timeframes. Our paper evaluates these impacts by investigating (1) the
